## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality improvements are underway, with new articles showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [SEO performance is trending upward, but CTRs need improvement](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New mid-article CTAs to be implemented based on content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Metrics glossary project proposed to boost SEO and industry positioning](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow and Quality Improvements

  - [New content generation workflow implemented, resulting in improved quality](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Articles with "-L" suffix represent the latest, improved content](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team to review new articles for significant quality and relevance improvements](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Older articles may be reworked based on the success of the new approach](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### SEO Performance and Reporting

  - [Overall trend line for impressions is upward](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Daily impressions hovering around the average](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [CTRs are generally low, indicating room for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [19 pages published so far, with varying performance](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Emerging keyword clusters: AI agent benchmarks, LLM evaluation/framework](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

### Mid-Article CTAs Implementation

  - [New strategy to insert targeted CTAs based on content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Shohil to provide existing graphics and text options for CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [New generic CTAs (e.g., YouTube subscription) may need design work](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Goal: standardize CTA insertion in editing process and retrofit existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

### Metrics Glossary Project

  - [Proposal to create a comprehensive metrics glossary for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Focus on industry-wide metrics rather than Galileo-specific ones](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Vivek to work with Pratik on mapping industry terms to Galileo-specific metrics](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Aim to drive traffic and funnel readers to Galileo product pages](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Content Planning and Review Process

  - [Airtable used for content pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Statuses include: Proposed, Scheduled, Client Review, Editing, Published, Retired](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Team (primarily Connor and Shohil) to review and approve proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to contact Pratik regarding metrics glossary project](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Shohil to provide CTA graphics and text options to Vivek](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Team to review latest articles (with "-L" suffix) for quality improvements](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Standardize performance reporting in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Schedule technical SEO review in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Continue refining content quality and monitoring SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/drMTGs_ysK3e28zt4CNGoJvXxf7JAaes?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
